prompt: Fill the piano silhouette from image 1 with the word “دریا” written in the Persian calligraphy style of image 3, arranged wave-like to follow the contours of the ocean in image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate an image where the internal area of the grand piano silhouette from image 1 is completely filled with instances of the Persian word “دریا”. These words must be rendered in the distinct Persian calligraphy style shown in image 3 and arranged in multiple undulating, horizontal layers, mimicking the wave patterns and layered appearance of the watercolor ocean in image 2, adapting their flow to the internal shape of the piano.
objects: Multiple instances of the Persian word “دریا”
Blue watercolor tones (for the text layers)
